ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patch where the animal is located */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate of the animal's location */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate of the animal's location */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the animal within the study */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal (XY for male, XX for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal in years */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the animal in grams */,
  "mature" INTEGER /* Maturity status (1 for mature, 0 for immature) */,
  "new_mature" INTEGER /* New maturity status (1 if the animal has newly matured, 0 otherwise) */,
  "lay_eggs" INTEGER /* Number of eggs laid by the animal */,
  "capture" INTEGER /* Number of times the animal has been captured */,
  "recapture" INTEGER /* Number of times the animal has been recaptured */,
  "infection" INTEGER /* Infection status (1 if infected, 0 otherwise) */,
  "cdist" REAL /* Distance to the center of the patch */,
  "hindex" REAL /* Habitat index of the location */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the animal */,
  "class_file" TEXT /* Class file associated with the animal */,
  "sub_patch_id" INTEGER /* Sub-patch ID within the main patch */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the animal */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Genus ID of the animal */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the animal */,
  "bloodline" TEXT /* Bloodline of the animal */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Mother's ID */,
  "father_id" INTEGER /* Father's ID */,
  "pedigree" TEXT /* Pedigree information */,
  "ring_id" TEXT /* Ring ID */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "patch_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the patch location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, grassland) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the patch in square meters */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Habitat type (e.g., terrestrial, aquatic) */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Vegetation type (e.g., trees, shrubs) */,
  "terrain_difficulty" TEXT /* Terrain difficulty (e.g., easy, challenging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., genus, family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life event */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of life event (e.g., mature, lay_eggs) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_events_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal associated with the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "infection_status" TEXT /* Infection status (e.g., infected, not infected) */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of any treatments provided */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the animal's condition */,
  "prescription" TEXT /* Prescribed medication or treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captures" (
  "capture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capture event */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal captured */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the capture occurred */,
  "capture_location" TEXT /* Location where the capture occurred */,
  "capture_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the capture (e.g., health check, relocation) */,
  "capture_method" TEXT /* Method used for capture (e.g., net, trap) */,
  "handling_notes" TEXT /* Notes on handling the animal during capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captures_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_data" (
  "genetic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal associated with the genetic data */,
  "dna_sequence" TEXT /* DNA sequence of the animal */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the animal */,
  "haplotype" TEXT /* Haplotype of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genetic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_data_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
